title: India Is Moving Fast to Build A.I. Data Centers. A Coastal City May Pay the Price.
summary_full: With India lagging in the technology, officials are embracing giant data centers. But critics say the megaprojects will use up energy and water, without providing long-term jobs.
summary_public: With India lagging in the technology, officials are embracing giant data centers. But critics say the megaprojects will use up energy and water, without providing long-term jobs.
